auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HasData API key sent with the x-api-key header. Sign in at https://app.hasdata.com/sign-in, open account settings, and copy your API key.

actions.name: scrape_web
actions.description: Scrape one public web page through HasData's synchronous Web Scraping API and return the official JSON payload.

url.description: The absolute public URL HasData should scrape.

items.description: One HasData Web Scraping API output format.

outputFormat.description: Response formats HasData should include in the result.

proxyType.description: The proxy type HasData should use for the target page.

proxyCountry.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used for HasData proxy geolocation.

extractRules.description: String values keyed by caller-defined field names.

aiExtractRules.description: Structured AI extraction rules accepted by HasData.

screenshot.description: Whether HasData should capture a page screenshot.

extractEmails.description: Whether HasData should extract email addresses from the page.

extractLinks.description: Whether HasData should extract hyperlinks from the page.

wait.description: Delay in milliseconds after page load before HasData scrapes the page.

waitFor.description: CSS selector HasData should wait for before scraping.

blockResources.description: Whether HasData should block images and stylesheets while loading the page.

blockAds.description: Whether HasData should block common ad scripts and tracking pixels.

blockUrls.description: Network request substrings or domains HasData should block.

jsRendering.description: Whether HasData should enable JavaScript rendering for the page.

jsScenario.description: JavaScript browser actions HasData should run on the page.

headers.description: HTTP headers HasData should send to the target website.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for scraping one public web page with HasData.

payload.description: Raw JSON object returned by HasData.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a HasData web scrape.

actions.name: search_google_serp
actions.description: Run one synchronous Google SERP search through HasData and return the official JSON payload.

q.description: Search term to query Google for.

location.description: Google canonical location for the search.

domain.description: Google domain to use for the search, such as google.com.

gl.description: Two-letter country code used to localize results.

hl.description: Two-letter language code used for the search interface.

lr.description: Language restriction for the web content returned by Google.

tbs.description: Google advanced filter expression such as qdr:d or sbd:1.

safe.description: Adult content filtering mode sent to Google.

filter.description: Whether Google should enable similar and omitted result filtering.

nfpr.description: Whether Google should show only the original query.

start.description: Number of search results to skip for pagination.

deviceType.description: Device type HasData should emulate for Google results.

ludocid.description: Google Place ID for a specific location result.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a HasData Google SERP request.

payload.description: Raw JSON object returned by HasData.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a HasData Google SERP request.
